200.description: The xuid associated with the gamertag or an empty object if there is account with the given gamertag

schema.description: Generic format for pretty much every error
schema.title: Error

400.description: The gamertag is invalid (empty or longer than 16 chars)

schema.description: Generic format for pretty much every error
schema.title: Error

503.description: The requested account was not cached and we were not able to call the Xbox Live API (rate limited / not setup)
